scripts.install:all: cd api && bun install && cd ../app && bun install
scripts.setup: bun run install:all && cd api && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed
scripts.build: concurrently "cd api && bun run build" "cd app && bun run build"
scripts.preview: concurrently --names "API,APP" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd api && bun run start" "cd app && bun run preview"
